MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ANSAFONE'S Motion To Change Venue is Off calendar. On February 1, 2013, Plaintiff dismissed, without prejudice, the complaint. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
